headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -106.4)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 45% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate today with 161 quotes and an outsized 135 at strong intensity, driving the score to 70.7 — people are venting hard and loudly.
• Frustrations nearly doubled from yesterday's 39.6 and sit in the upper half of the 179-day range, though still well below the peak of 171.4.
• Optimism dropped sharply to -51.9 from -24.1 yesterday, now near its historical low of -65.2, while Fears remain quiet and steady around -16.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
